query: SELECT pp.id, pp.guest_id, rp.relayNumber, rp.completionPct FROM player_profiles pp LEFT JOIN relay_progress rp ON pp.id = rp.profileId WHERE pp.guest_id = 'g_mdjfevj9f3';
